title: Select all items on board for email
excerpt: As a user when I am viewing a board & I select the select all check box it should actually select ALL items without a 500 item limit to allow me to do a mass email or any other action you would do by selecting multiple i…

posts.author: JBDenver (Jeff Boivin)
posts.cookedHtml:
As a user when I am viewing a board & I select the select all check box it should actually select ALL items without a 500 item limit to allow me to do a mass email or any other action you would do by selecting multiple items.

We are a small to mid size business w/ about 550 customers & the fact we can’t email all our customers at once but have to do it in multiple batches is very disappointing from a company as big as Monday.

I have used other smaller business applications/companies than Monday that allow you to generate reports/lists of an unlimited number of recipients to send an email blast w/ an Outlook Integration.

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Good point. We are totally struggling with this as well.
